items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding the OAuth consent screen clarity. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the outcome of this validation or captures any relevant traces or snapshots. The lack of concrete results or documentation leads to an inconclusive status regarding the expected result of the scenario.
